Blue Is the Warmest Color

La Vie d'Adèle - Chapitres 1 et 2

"To love."

7.1
2013MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

Adèle's life is changed when she meets Emma, a young woman with blue hair, who will allow her to discover desire, to assert herself as a woman and as an adult. In front of others, Adele grows, seeks herself, loses herself, finds herself.

Tags

homophobiaself-discoveryeroticismcoming of agelovelesbian relationshipsexual attractionbased on graphic novelhigh school studentsexual desireteenage sexualitylgbtsexual awakeningliterary adaptationsocial class
